$meta.purpose: Define spacing scale, layout dimensions, padding rules, and gaps between containers

rules.name: Horizontal layout padding
rules.rule: Always wrap main contents in a container with max-w-[1280px] mx-auto, and use responsive horizontal padding (px-4 on mobile, px-8 on desktop).

rules.name: Component vertical spacing
rules.rule: Group high-level page sections using a vertical flex layout with space-y-8 spacing.
rules.evidence: Observed on main layout and page wrappers.

rules.name: Information dense grids
rules.rule: Grids listing navigation choices or cards should use a layout gap of 16px (gap-4) or a column gap of 32px (gap-x-8) with row gap of 24px (gap-y-6) to maintain density.
rules.evidence: SupportGrid uses gap-4; BrowseByTopic uses gap-x-8 gap-y-6.
